problem id: 1d342a52
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(6) XOR SHL(4)

examples:
  00100110 -> 11101001
  00011001 -> 11010110
  11001010 -> 00010010
  11110001 -> 01101100
  11100001 -> 01101000
  00101100 -> 11001011
  11111111 -> 00001111
  00101010 -> 00101010

query: 11001000
predicted answer: 10110010
